families.name: Structural
families.summary: Transformations that rearrange, expose, duplicate, embed, or reference structure.

families.name: Decomposition
families.summary: Transformations that divide structure into multiple derived structures.

families.name: Aggregation
families.summary: Transformations that combine multiple structures into a derived structure.

families.name: Compression
families.summary: Transformations that reduce structure into a compressed representation.

families.name: Elaboration
families.summary: Transformations that expose, derive, or unfold additional structure.

families.name: Relocation
families.summary: Transformations that move structure across time, place, context, or frame.

families.name: Evolution
families.summary: Transformations that create successor states or divergent continuities.

families.name: Contextual
families.summary: Transformations that attach or remove contextual dependencies.

families.name: Normative
families.summary: Transformations that govern permission or admissibility.

families.name: Observational
families.summary: Transformations that create evidentiary assertions about structure or change.
